name: Atlas Arteria
analysis: ALX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$5.0124. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$5.0559 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$5.0124, stop A$4.7669, target A$5.5036. Risk/reward is 2.00:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
